programmes.show_description: Silent Fear. Paranormal investigators Amy Bruni and Adam Berry and psychic medium Chip Coffey help a family who are being haunted by a demented creature. S4, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Dad With No Limbs: Body Bizarre
programmes.show_description: Dad With No Limbs. Three-year-old Ana suffers from a brain crushing prematurely fused skull. Alex had septicaemia that rapidly led to the amputation of all four of his limbs. S6, Ep3

Space Case. The baggage battlers head to a government auction in Sacramento, California. Mark Meyer cuts into the Martin's profit by bidding high on a box of knives. S3, Ep6
Two-Faced. The baggage battlers head to a police auction in Stockton, California, where one of the auction specialists discover a mask mould of a famous Hollywood icon. S3, Ep7
What a Dummy. The Baggage Battlers head to a police auction in Stockton, California. There are plenty of valuable items to choose from, including a vintage slot machine. S3, Ep2
Lady Luck. The baggage battlers head to an esteemed estate sale in St. Paul, where they bid on items ranging from automotive parts and a rare doll to a hockey mascot costume. S3, Ep3
Blow Up. The baggage battlers head to an unclaimed crate auction Tucson, Arizona and things really heat up when one of the experts tests a vintage bomb detonator. S3, Ep4
Mike Tyson's Punch Out. The baggage battlers head to an estate auction in Jacksonville, Florida, where pop culture collectibles and sealed boxes are amongst the items on offer. S3, Ep5

Guns a-Blazin'. The baggage battlers head to a cowboy auction in California, where they duel over items dating back to the legendary Buffalo Bill and the Barnum & Bailey circuses. S3, Ep8

One Car Wonder. It's Wayne's 1938 Lincoln Model K coupe vs. a 1938 Packard when Wayne and his friend compete at a car competition. Later, Wayne searches for the perfect Bugatti. S11, Ep1
Wayne's Gotta Wait. A trip to buy a rare American-Yale motorcycle gives Wayne the perfect excuse to visit a collection of hot rods. He sets his eyes on a 1950 Oldsmobile 88. S11, Ep2
No Replacement For Displacement. Wayne buys the ultimate dream car: an all-original 1955 Mercedes 300 SL 'Gullwing' that's been hidden from the public eye for decades. S11, Ep3
(AC) Ace In The Hole. Wayne is in Virginia to help sell an impeccable 1958 AC Ace Bristol roadster. In California, a 1968 Toyota Corona makes an unforgettable impression. S11, Ep4
Where's The Gold Paulie. A car doesn't always need to be totally rebuilt. Dave swaps the chassis and upgrade performance for a 1955 Nomad to give the car the edge it was missing. S5, Ep9
Dave Kindig, Guest Judge. Car show season is always a big time of year for the crew, but a show has called with a special request. They want Dave to be a judge and present an award. S5, Ep10
Veruca Violet. Corvette enthusiast Rick Cox has brought in his '63 Corvette to take it to the next level. He wants some serious upgrades, including a huge LS X engine. S5, Ep11
Finishing The Ember Glow Hemi. Shorty tries to match the Ember Glow hemi's original colour, Joel installs an aftermarket AC, and the crew works on the interior and trim. S2, Ep5
Training Day Lowrider. A big fan of 'Training Day' wants his '78 Monte Carlo built in the same vein, with a swapped LS, beefed-up brakes and suspension, and a new interior. S2, Ep6
Debris Of Amelia Earhart. Jeremy explores aircraft debris that may be linked to the disappearance of Amelia Earhart. Plus, he examines an ancient anchor in the Mediterranean. S2, Ep5
Titanic Phenomenon. Jeremy Wade explores a ground-breaking scientific discovery that could change everything known about the most infamous shipwreck, the Titanic. S2, Ep6
Into The Storm. A dangerous storm threatens to shut down the operation just as Darrell and team discover gold ore in the remains of an old wreck. S2, Ep7
Striking Gold. Leading to one of the richest finds in Darrell's career, the team discovers ornate artefacts that indicate the location of a 16th century captain's quarters. S2, Ep8
Secrets Of Mackinac. Jess and Phil are joined by The Ghost Brothers as they continue to investigate Mackinac Island's mysteries. They explore a lighthouse with a dark past. S4, Ep2
Niagara Nightmare. Jess and Phil dive into the mysteries of Niagara Falls and its history of violent deaths. They investigate reports of disturbing paranormal activity. S4, Ep3
Witches Of Mexico. Phil and Jess travel to Monterrey, Mexico, where locals have encountered witches and black magic. They discover dark spells, blood rituals and animal sacrifice. S4, Ep4

Big Cold Gold. Shawn's million-dollar Bluff claim is denied, leaving the grounds open to anyone. Kris Kelly leaps at the chance, dragging his family across 70 miles of frozen tundra. S6, Ep11
Cold War. Shawn and Kris face off when the Kelly family invades Shawn's turf. Emily hits the ice with a crew of veteran miners in a bid to reclaim her hotspot at Hasting's Creek. S6, Ep12
The Poseidon Crew face a devastating financial disaster after permit delays. The Victoria Diggers are still awaiting approval to dig German Gully. S5, Ep2
Ivory-Billed Woodpecker. Forrest is determined to find out if the famously reclusive Ivory Billed Woodpecker still exists in the alligator and snake infested swamps of Louisiana. S2, Ep1
Turf War. On the Blue grounds, a captain's bet has the boats jockeying for position, while on the Red grounds, a returning veteran proves his worth. S8, Ep2
Weak Links. The Bering Sea exposes soft spots and weak links in each crew. While the skippers wonder which deckhands have the right stuff, the Time Bandit says goodbye to a crewmate. S8, Ep3
Hell And High Water. Ben is running out of food, but sudden snow gives hope of tracking wild game, while a promising dig site prompts Boyce to haul in his mining equipment. S1, Ep2
Corsica's Nazi Treasure. Josh hunts for the treasure of Erwin Rommel, a Nazi general who plundered the wealth of North Africa as his tank corps fled the continent. S3, Ep14

Sweet Homestead Alabama. For families moving entirely off-grid, the learning curve is steep. To save their homesteads, they call in survival experts to prepare them for the worst. S4, Ep3
The Foreign Claim. Isaac from the Opal Whisperers works an abandoned, dangerous mine. The Mooka Boys are confronted by an irate miner as they peg a claim too close to his mine. S6, Ep16

Man Down. The perilous Bering Sea is wreaking havoc. Sean is set to collide with another boat, two deckhands get taken down on the Wizard, and Jake almost loses a deckhand, twice. S13, Ep16
Hillstrand's Last Catch. Two old friends race to finish their seasons. Johnathan Hillstrand wants to bid farewell in a blaze of glory, but the Bering Sea may have other plans. S13, Ep17
Burning Inside Out. Ylena's neck painfully dislocates at the slightest movement. Kayla has an extremely rare and painful condition where her arm burns on the inside. S6, Ep1

programmes.show_name: My Body Is Eating My Bones Body Bizarre
programmes.show_description: My Body Is Eating My Bones. Ignacia suffers from a facial tumour that could asphyxiate her. Thomas has a rare bone eating disease that has ruined the left side of his torso. S6, Ep2
